channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: You don't need that new car. You don't need a car from the dealership let alone multiple leases. You don't need a 2k mor… — 21 replies — 84.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
You don't need that new car. You don't need a car from the dealership let alone multiple leases. You don't need a 2k mor…

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-06-17 08:41 UTC

OP

You don't need that new car. You don't need a car from the dealership let alone multiple leases. You don't need a 2k mortgage. You don't need plane tickets when a road trip can save money. You don't need all those subscriptions. You don't need to hire landscapers. You don't need apple products. You don't need student loans. You don't need a smart fridge. You don't need fancy food for your dog. You don't need a 4k tv. You don't need to go skiing. You don't need a boat. You don't need to eat at restaurants. You don't need a gaming PC. You don't need to pay more than $30 for a haircut. Or anything really. You don't need to shop at Sam's club. You don't need to shop at Costco. You don't need to shop at Best Buy. You don't need to buy a bunch of fancy ingredients and larp as a chef. You don't need a granite counter top. You don't need to buy Claude tokens. You don't need to buy sports tickets. You don't need a cat. You don't need to pay more than $35 for a phone bill. You don't need to pay for new tires. You can get them used. You don't need to buy premium gas. You don't need to tell the insurance company how many people live with you. You don't need to buy any books, use project Gutenberg. You don't need all those tools in the garage. You don't use half of them anyways. You don't need a home with a garage. You don't need to be on the HOA. You don't need to go on weekly dates with your gf. You don't need to go on weekly dates with your wife. You don't need to buy condoms. You don't need to buy diapers. You don't need all sorts of sauces and condiments in the fridge. You don't need warranties ANY warranty, just take care of your things. You don't need to go to concerts. You don't need to have a blue checkmark. You don't need to eat food at events. You don't need a house with stairs. You don't need carpet on those stairs. You don't need a leather couch. You don't need to have the fastest wifi. You don't need to buy pornographic art. You don't need to buy beer. Or any drug.

Early replies (first 3)

62377958
>>62377955
man no one is reading allat nigga fucking die in a fire.

62378430
some wealthy people have so much money they don't even have enough time to spend it. the costs of things is just another thing that takes time. the secret is to remove the things that gatekeep time so the time can be spent on things you want not have to

62378534
>>62377955
I don't know what you meant by this but this was the most relaxing thing I've ever read and it describes my life and outlook

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62378550
>>62377955
I needed this, thank you

62378563
>>62377955
>You don't need to buy condoms
Smile crept onto my face. Based

62378597
>>62377955
you don't need to live kys faggot

62378610
>>62377958
this.
only thing people need to read is the fact I need 10k.

62378617
>>62377955
I'm not reading that wall of text.

I already have a new car (Toyota Corolla) paid off. My rent is $900/mo and I split it with my mom, so it's really only $450. I don't like sitting in a car for hours or driving on a freeway. A flight to Miami from where I live is about 2.5 hours, a car ride would be 19 hours if you don't stop for food, restroom, gas or sleep.

62378622
>>62378617
no one asked

62378624
>>62377955
I do want some of these things however, and I will use money to buy them. What, am I supposed to live miserably like some FIRE redditor and spend the best years of my life physically on wage slaving for a future that may never come or that I will be too damaged to enjoy? No thanks.

62378680
>>62378622
ESL?

Learn proper grammar, retard.

62378689
>>62378680
you might want to go back to school if you think that this isn't proper grammar, nigger

62378695
>>62377955
I need the cute and funny tho.

62378857
based op

62378869
>>62378689
>He still doesn't capitalize the first letter, or end a comment with a period.

62378877
>>62378869
this has nothing to do with proper grammar or ESL. Nobody types like this any longer, fucking boomer

62378880
>>62378877
Don't text me until you're educated enough to have an intellectual conversation.

62378883
>>62378880
take the L, grandpa

62378886
>>62378883
*Accept you have lost, senior citizen.

62378888
>>62378886
bro, just say you have asperger, you already gave it away the moment you said you live with your mom

62378897
>>62378888
Quads don't lie...

item.title: What made you still hold BTC? — 38 replies — 77.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
What made you still hold BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-06-17 08:20 UTC

OP

Bitcoin has gone through multiple cycles, crashes, and endless criticism, yet many continue to hold. What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

Early replies (first 3)

62371733
>>62371718
>What keeps your conviction strong after all these years?

62371807
The only reason to ever sell bitcoin is to buy more at a lower price.

62371917
>>62371807
correct
>waiting for a good entry

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62372189
>>62371718
Unwavering belief that BTC is how WAGMI.

62372279
It's like a runescape party hat without the duplication glitch.

62372380
>>62371718
BTC was created by kraken, coinbase and binance in 2017. Upon launch they confused their users into thinking this new asset was Bitcoin. They did this to convince miners to chase profit on a minority fork. Miners are understood to be the adopters, voters and stewards of the technology. Getting the majority hashrate onto the new fork was imperative. It worked flawlessly with miners abandoning Bitcoin to mine this new handicapped network called BTC. My conviction remains with Bitcoin, the only tech that can elevate humanity. BTC is not Bitcoin.

62372396
Its not, I bought and sold like 10 times

62372419
>>62371718
I'm a bagholder since 2018. I got some returns but I'm obviously not happy. Still much better than my Link bag which is a disaster. I always notice trends too late, being hyperliquid the latest one i missed. Still bought at 62 and will try to sell at 70+.
Unironically, hype seems the only crypto i have more faith atm even though I got like 4k riding.
My BTC bag is worth 200k atm. Sucks.
Also, i started diversifying into Nasdaq and sp500 i lost faith on BTC being he fastest vehicle and i think next bull run we'll be very lucky if we even reach 180k top. We probably get front runned at 140-150k. Still I'll be dropping heavily my bags then

62372448
>>62371718
Truly decentralised money

62372468
>>62372051
The problem with NFTs is how they have such a small market cap while being extremely illiquid on top of that. Any shitcoin ranked #320 on CoinGecko has a higher market cap than Pudgy Penguins, and 50x to 100x its trading volume. That’s an automatic turn-off for any whale that would want to invest millions in the top NFTs. These bags would be hard to sell at the right moment.

62372501
>>62372380
>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today

62372915
>>62372501
>>mfw the real Bitcoin is only $226 today
lol!
bcash cucks BTFO
>we don't need POW, we will have 10-block "finalisation rule!!!"
wow, just as Satoshi intended! lamao.

62373544
>>62371807
Everyone has that plan until Bitcoin decides to never give them their entry back.

62373685
>>62372056
no, they're going to print more for the US and going to bail out the cash strapped holders of US bonds with swap lines

62374097
>>62371917
What's your entry price?

62374451
>>62372043
Depends what you're optimizing for. Some people want the next 100x. Others are happy finding ways to make their BTC a bit more productive without giving up exposure entirely.

62375554
>>62372051
Maybe, but doesn't the ETF route introduce a different trade-off?

62375717
Nice triple post faglord

62376610
>>62372056
No reason to stop printing

62376672
>>62376610

62377200
>>62372468
Nft lol

62377213
>>62372915
What do you mean?

62377217
>>62374451
How do you do that?

62377221
Ethereum

62377225
>>62372419
Link is fine. Wait till $1000

62377236
>>62371718
Not a BTC investor myself, but I imagine it's hard to ignore something that has repeatedly survived the kinds of events many thought would kill it.

62377444
Nothing about bitcoin has fundamentally changed.

62377533
>>62377444
C-checked

62377691
>>62377444
>Nothing about bitcoin has fundamentally changed.
checked and confirmed

62378619
>>62377217
You can natively stake it through a protocol while still maintaining self-custody. That way, you can earn more instead of just holding your BTC.

62378621
>>62372059
Maybe he's wrong. Maybe he's right. Either way, locking in gains after buying near the lows is hard to criticize.

62378868
>>62378619
If you're doing on centralised services you're cooked

62378871
>>62377691
Genius nerd. pretentious

item.title: Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology — 18 replies — 44.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Investing in Sex Robots & Aritifical Womb Technology

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-06-17 08:25 UTC

OP

This will be one of the greatest investment opportunities in our lifetime within another decade or so.

Tech is stagnating, just as every other industry is out of viable optimization methodologies. There is nothing new being created, every niche is saturated and optimized. AI will produce some value but it is ultimately a giant bubble that will never, and I mean never advance to the point of consciousness or intelligence (unless they use biological brains and do so correctly - they will fail). Science doesn't even know where consciousness comes.

That being said: sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness) will be the big new technology that solves real world problems. And the funny thing is: tech companies will eventually run out of other means of generating increasing revenue and will essentially HAVE to go this route, just like they're currently doing with AI. They have nothing else. This technology will have vast and continuous demand as it will entirely replace the old/current paradigm.

Early replies (first 3)

62375864
>>62375553
I want sexbots to be real so bad

62375914
>>62375864
same
all the despair, pain and unhappiness i feel... if it was a good sexbot i would be happy.
the thing is, the first sexbots will be bad. like truly awful. probably not physically dangerous... maybe. but not enjoyable. like how electric masturbators are really good at making me nut, but a soulless experience that leaves me feeling empty. the technology to replace a living organism with a robot is just not there.
if it were viable, there would be news. most people who are lonely and horny want the sexbot. but porn and masturbators are the best we have. sexbots are an AI complete problem.

62375977
>>62375553
>sex robots and eventual artificial womb tech (much easier than actually creating consciousness)
AI is not about creating consciousness. you are retarded if you think intelligence requires consciousness.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376084
>>62375977
"AI" is just a number of algos operating within a matrix of data to produce output similar to some complex bot. AI is NOT intelligent, it is a pseudo-thinking automation.
>When faced with novel scenarios that deviate from training patterns (e.g., a simple detour in a known city map), these systems often fail spectacularly, revealing they lack a coherent mental model of reality.
consciousness, or something tantamount to it, is the only thing that can transform AI from rote, confined calculation machines into actual thinking machines. Scientists will never be able to replicate this.

62376404
>>62375553
Fetuses grown in artificial wombs will be stunted in ways we won't fully appreciate until they're born. They won't hear their mother's voice or her heartbeat. They won't hear their father's voice, either. They won't hear anyone. Only the click and whine of machines, the droning gurgle of synthetic embryonic fluids. Grown like lab rats by scientists that see them as a commodity. I shudder at the thought.
>entire crops were lost

62376422
>>62376404
Sorry, did I say born? I mean dispensed

62376501
>>62375553
Nah just give me ai glasses that tell you if a girl is interested so we can stop this annoying boomer "read the room" nonsense. That's all I ask. Would save us all a lot of time and embarrassment too.

62376962
>>62376404
An artificial womb could be an improvement over women in the end. Imagine having the best genes for you selected.

62377004
>>62376501
bro just remove the middle man get one of those smartphone hypnosis app instead.

62377063
>>62376404
This. I just had my son 2 years ago and it is sickening to imagine him being robbed of skin to skin connection (Google it), breastfeeding over formula (Google it too), and god knows what else dopamine and serotonin he's been getting through kisses and cuddles. Such children would be riddled with mental illness and allergies as a minimum.

62377134
>>62375553
I will not put my penis into that thing

62377166
>>62375553
daaad, why did you think it was a good idea to clone me when you're a schizo permavirgin?

62377171
>>62376501
>ai glasses that tell you if a girl is interested
bro that'd just be like normal glasses for you

62377186
>>62376404
well why would technology produce a human, even when it theoretically can? technology wants to produce more technology. synthetic babies will be perfectly fit but they will also be inhuman.

62378763
>>62375553
The whole "artificial womb will make women worthless" take sounds like peak clown-world panic, not reality. It assumes women only have value because biology currently gives them a monopoly on pregnancy. That's a bizarre reduction of women to a single biological function, as if their social, economic, intellectual, emotional, and political influence suddenly evaporates the moment technology changes the rules of the game.
In reality, if artificial wombs become viable, women are far more likely to leverage the technology than be displaced by it. History shows that when a burden is removed, people don't become less valuable—they gain more freedom to negotiate from a position of strength. Pregnancy carries physical risks, career interruptions, health complications, and enormous time costs. If technology can externalize part of that burden
The assumption that artificial wombs somehow "replace" women also misunderstands how power works. Technologies rarely erase human incentives; they rearrange them. Women would still be mothers, partners, decision-makers, professionals, innovators, and participants in shaping the social norms surrounding reproduction. The ability to separate reproduction from pregnancy could even increase female autonomy by allowing greater control over timing, health outcomes, and life planning.
The clownish part of the argument is imagining that society would wake up one morning and conclude that half the population has become obsolete because a medical device exists.
If anything, artificial wombs could become another tool that women strategically use to maximize freedom, reduce biological constraints, and negotiate family formation on terms that better align with their goals. The idea that it automatically diminishes women says more about a narrow view of female value than it does about the technology itself.

62378829
>>62378763
even more men troon out/fag out and use artificial wombs to justify mgtow. supply and demand.

62378845
>>62378763
While I semi agree with you, the whole “women become worthless” thing refers to how men have to approach women for sex and family. It effectively cuts the major reason men interact with women that are not their family.

62378879
>>62378845
the whole female liberation is kinda retarded. by breaking tradition, women enable fag meta. among zoomers like 30% are open fags. if tradition collapses, men will just bum other men. if we get actually good biotech and ability for the bottom men to look decent, guys will stop paying any attention to femoids at all. femoids just can't compete, no man actually genuinely wants to talk to them or be in their company. the only two reasons we're not 100% fags are reproduction(solved by incel bags) and majority bottom guys(like all of you anons) being really ugly. if you could have a family with a cute anon you'd do it and never even recall that there are women. greeks understood this.

item.title: >UK less than someone in Mississippi >UK is poorer than all of 50 American states >Gets taxed 41% if you make anywhere n… — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>UK less than someone in Mississippi >UK is poorer than all of 50 American states >Gets taxed 41% if you make anywhere n…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-17 08:44 UTC

OP

>UK less than someone in Mississippi
>UK is poorer than all of 50 American states
>Gets taxed 41% if you make anywhere north of 40k
>Walk outside of London and it gets much worse
....

How do Europeans even live? Is all of the UK just a backwater rural wasteland outside of London?

Early replies (first 3)

62377614
>>62377608
yes lawyers make 20k in the UK lmao

62377646
>>62377608
Who cares

62377666
>>62377646
Im sure the poor sons of bitches in the UK care bro even their extremely educated make dog shit piss ass money

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62377670
>>62377646
Anglicans are beneath even those from backwater rural states in America.

62377673
>>62377646
Well the mass exodus of professional class

62378733
>>62377608
The London experiment, to be a tax haven for modern wealth and create the NYC of Europe, has failed. They all fled to Dubai.

62378738
You have to remember that England still has a countryside. While it's the worst victim of the NGO woke Soros political shenanigans you could still break up some functioning parts in the future as London inevitably collapses

62378777
>>62377608
In the UK people are plumbers and electricians

62378898
>>62377608
>Yeah bro, we're totally living in squalid third world conditions. Life is hellish and brutal on our quiet walks through sleepy 99% white villages with centuries-old buildings. That's why British people are falling over each other to emigrate to the paradise that is Mississippi. Moron.
If you had a passport you could go to Europe yourself. American quality of life is terrible because you either live in a niggerfied urban crime dystopia or you live in a zoned gated community full of boomers with no amenities. When we look at places to emigrate we look at places like Switzerland, not fucking muttland...

62378901
>>62378898
complete bollocks. many people going to the US for work all the time and even more aspiring to.

item.title: >after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you… — 11 replies — 23.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you…

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-06-17 08:22 UTC

OP

>after 15 months of monk mode, you finally talk to a woman, at a cafe you regularly attend, just like Claude advised you
>"Umm, WHY did you start talking to me?! Do I even know you? Is this a YouTube prank or something? *holds up her phone and takes a picture of you and the snap sound is extremely loud* This one's going on my LinkedIn Overcoming Adversity by Rejecting Creeps Pinterest board!"
>You open your mouth to say something but she interrupts
>"Ohmigod, Tessica, Vaporeon, come quick, this ugly creep is trying to talk to me like those Andrew Tate TikTok videos!! Awww, he think's he's a big Alpha Chad for trying to scare girls into sex slavery!!"
>they burst out laughing and take multiple videos and pictures of you within ten seconds, to better train the AI
>her other friend has already asked the cashier for a "Squidgy Marshmallow Latte" (code for "call the police, a rape is ongoing")
>your trial is televised and the barrister's questioning of you becomes an international meme that culminates in a new form of brain rot and an indie horror movie adaptation that grosses $600 million worldwide
>you aren't sent to jail but your likeness is put into all AI threat scanning technology and a small set of numbers buried within every AI weight bars you from all employment and banking for the rest of your life

Early replies (first 3)

62374396
who the fuck is claude?

62374419
>>62374390
You joke but it’s fucking impossible to tell which women want you to approach them and which don’t, making cold approach a pain in the ass. And i get women who don’t like it, i find phone and street sellers annoying as fuck also. Tinder seems like so much easier option, or approaching women at clubs.

62374434
Wise money takes candid photos of them without approaching, and generates AI porn later. You got greedy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62376482
>>62374434
>go up to a woman
>take multiple pictures of her point blank
>"WHAT THE HELL?!!?!!"
>walk away and go home
>Have AI create a fully animated POV sex scene
>have a custom API make it so the pelvic thrusts automatically sync up with your mechanized masturbator sex toy molded to your cock specifically
>put on VR goggles
>*nut*
>rinse and repeat with basically any woman ever
Kinda crazy how dystopian that sounds given that it's not just possible, but every guy with a computer and more than two brain cells can do it.
Flying cars they said.

62376585
>>62374390
why the hell would i regularly attend a cafe?

62378752
>>62374390
C-can this really happen

62378765
Is this financial advice ?

62378790
>tessica

62378818
>>62374390
>Tessica, Vaporeon
My sides

62378865
Must suck not being handsome and constantly having w*men stare longingly at you

62378874
>>62374390
Well, you beat my shitposting today...

Good job OP.

you buy they sell, while telling you to buy even more

You literally formed your identity around a bad investment you made (link) to such an extent you feel like people calling it out are individually threatening you, and you chose the most jewy, least real utility having, most obvious scam coin possible 7 years after it was obvious they were building a software business fundraising and not even going to flesh out demand for the token beyond announcements that mean nothing to token holders but they know token holders will misunderstand and they can dump directly on them on the basis of.

i hate XRP baggie retards so much.

When you put it that way I am so fucking bullish holy shit

62376000

62376014

so bullish

item.title: >month 8 at my first office job >havent touched more than 33% of my salary since i started according to chatgpt i can re… — 10 replies — 2.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>month 8 at my first office job >havent touched more than 33% of my salary since i started according to chatgpt i can re…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-17 05:17 UTC

OP

>month 8 at my first office job
>havent touched more than 33% of my salary since i started
according to chatgpt i can retire in 8 years at this rate
there HAS to be a faster way to escape this daily humiliation ritual
i literally have not felt joy since i started working

Early replies (first 3)

62377269
>>62377212
8 years and you're complaining?

also this isn't your blog, kys nigger

62377302
>>62377212
what do you do and what's your salary? maybe i can help

62377309
>>62377212
Stop working in an office and go clean a portojohn.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62377313
if it makes you feel better, 2026 has been the worst year for layoffs since 2022.

62377334
>>62377302
IT jeet
it was about 2.5k dolla a month but now its more like 4k a month
>>62377313
if i got laid off id be happy

62377336
>>62377334
Don’t listen to chat gpt about what to do. Go to a real financial advisor at a reputable firm and ask them how to retire in 5 years.

62377341
>>62377334
I take it you're a literal jeet. Because if you make 4k and only touch 1/3 of that you must be living in a literal shithole.

>t. Europoor making 5k eurobucks net and that's considered a comical high salary as an IT jeet here

62377347
>>62377336
i dont wanna pay money for someone to be laughed at
>>62377341
i live in a country with low cost of living + im extremely frugal

62377359
>>62377347
It's okay to say a 3rd world country anon.
I'm not gonna call you nigger lmao.
To your topic we're on the same bost., I'll have to continue wage cucking 10years + at this rhythm to be able to make it

62378609
Any form of working is torture to me, how do I explain the feeling to normies.

That's how quick it'll snap and this ain't even utility yet. WAKE THE FUCK UP.

item.title: Legoshit Criminal Investigation /LCI/ Discussion — 24 replies — 79.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Legoshit Criminal Investigation /LCI/ Discussion

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-06-17 08:31 UTC

OP

It's a financial crime. I was curious if any of you tards had anything interesting to say about it.

62377741

62377783
>>62377728

I love it when random youtubers think they're busting criminals and wind up in prison themselves

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62377792
>>62377728

62377793
>>62377792
no one is spending money on 4chan's /biz/ to boost youtube videos are you reeeeetarded

62377800
>>62377793
Go back!

62377807
>>62377728
the whole thing is very strange. b&m is clearly liable for the consignment as the corporate entity, but idk of the mormon courts in utah give a shit.
wasn't the actual store in Washington, though? if they can sue in Washington state court or federal court then they have a strong case.

>>62377793
good cause there's like 42 real people on /biz/

62377808
>>62377800
I don't like reddit therefore I am here, dipshit.

62377809
>>62377783
>"hi, I have a question about some missing lego."
>"YOU HAVE VIOLATED AND HARASSED US FOR THE LAST TIME, YOU ARE UNDER ARREST BY THE FEDERATION OF MORMON SPACE WIVES AND GOLDEN COCK-SLEEVES"
BAM and that police department are both fucked lol.

62377817
>>62377808
Kys

62377832
>>62377817
kys kys babe

>>62377809
I just don't know how the FBI sees this shit and doesn't swoop in like Mississippi Burning lmao
It's great content for anyone paying attention.

62377833
>>62377783
>>62377809
>"oh wow so they dont want to talk to you? LET ME DO LE FUNNEY QUIRKEY THING like hanging up banners and shit in addition to actually helping, all of which which can at least be used as grounds for harassment"
>"HUUUUUH WHAT DO YOU MEAN I GOT A RESTRAINT ORDER FOR STALKING?!?!??!?!"
also the fact its like 20k theyre missing and not 200k going by coffeezillas calcs
not saying that BAM isnt acting fucking stupid and these cops need an investigation but people pretending like ben didnt literally ask for SOME shit to happen are retarded, and at this point it looks more and more as if theres a bit more to this than le poor grandpa not being paid whats due

62377837
>>62377832
No, you!

62377845
Mormons won

62377855
>>62377777
>77777

62377862
>>62377832
>I just don't know how the FBI sees this shit and doesn't swoop in like Mississippi Burning lmao
because local LEOs are handling it just fine.

>it's ok if I harass people, I'm an influencer!
doesn't work like that.

62377872
>>62377862
>false heroin searches
yeah sure man
They tried to serve real court documents, gave it to the police so they wouldn't violate trespassing boundaries, police proceeded to voluntarily not serve them in hand. Seems legit.

62377878
>>62377872
did they pay the police to serve the papers?

62377885
>>62377878
Did they bribe law enforcement to hand the papers off to another citizen? No, but they did offer to take them to him. They stopped short while speaking to the other party.

62378407
>>62377777

62378434
>>62377885
My understanding is the plaintiff tried to serve the papers himself and was promptly charged with harassment and trespass.

which is an expected response to him illegally trying to serve papers

62378602
>>62377728
>Shitty book keeping by retarded owner
>Meets greedy scum
>Meets retarded jewtuber
>Meets corrupt cops
It's like a retard fest. Ben didn't even verify the true values of the Lego, the original store owner didn't even document her shit properly and doesn't know if she accidentally sold the Lego and forgot to give the original owner commissions. Greety mormon owners thought they hit the jackpot and tried a hostile take over only to get raped by retardation then panic at every turn when the winds were in their favour.

I just hit Not Interested on this shit

62378881
>>62377777
witnessed

62378889
>>62377728
Nobody cares anymore. Ben will be in prison soon and this will all go away in two weeks.

item.title: I talked to two people today about rent. — 149 replies — 50.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
I talked to two people today about rent.

Open thread • Replies: 149 • Updated: 2026-06-17 05:54 UTC

OP

I talked to two people today about rent.

The first guy said he lives in Atlanta and pays about $2,300 a month in rent. I mentioned that works out to roughly $27,600 a year, which I personally think is a lot for rent. He also told me he was let go from a sales job at a small company about two weeks ago. Small company = low pay. When I commented on the rent being high, he responded by saying, “maybe it is a lot for you.”

I told him it is a terrible financial decision.
I also told him that I live in a major city and my monthly taxes alone are more than that.

Later, I spoke with another guy who pays around $2,000 a month for a luxury apartment. That’s about $24,000 a year. I didn’t ask about his income or job situation, but I shared that I thought the annual rent cost seemed very high.

I kept telling him his rent was a waste of money and he should buy a house. He told me he might not want to to live somewhere for so long. I asked him how he expected to build wealth. The conversation went back and forth with me saying it was a waste of “money down the drain.” He eventually admitted it was hard and bad use of money and insulted me with “life is hard when YOU don’t live in mommies basement.”
Wow.
He is literally throwing money down the drain and I trying to give me good advice.

It made me wonder if people commonly spend over $20,000–$30,000 a year on rent? And if so, how common is that relative to income and lifestyle choices?

Please look at picrel. Do people spend so much of their paycheque on rent? How does anyone become rich?

Curious what others think about this.

Early replies (first 3)

62372611
>>62372604
>I talked to two people today about rent.
no you didn't

62372621
>$24k per year rent is throwing money down the drain
>$50k per year interest payments for 30 years to "own" the same thing is building wealth

Lol

Lmao

62372624
>>62372604

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62374657
>>62372621
What? My whole mortage is only 15k per year

62374661
>>62372604
It's very common for people to be rentslaves or house-poor their entire lives because they've been psyop shamed into avoiding living with their own family.

62376556
>>62372604
When you really think about it, home owners are losing a lot of money too. First there's the down payment, that money grows a lot faster in stocks. In some cases it may be worth more than the entire value of the house in 30 years. Housing simply can't compete with the gains from the stock market. Secondly, even if you own your home and it's a 600k asset. Living in it, is throwing money away. If you sold you could be making 60k a year from your investments. Renting for 30k a year would be a net gain.

Home owners are mostly idiots, unless they are landlords or rich and retired. It is the handicap that prevents high earners from ever making it.

62376833
>>62372604
It depends on the market of course but yeah $2300 is not high in most places these days. If you equate that to a house payment that is under $300k which in major metros is ghetto tier housing. There is nothing inherently wrong with renting from a financial standpoint, even Dave Ramsey would agree. If you are not planning to stay put for 5-10 years then you are better off renting. The transaction costs for home ownership are quite high, often 10% of the price. The most important factor is, as your picrel states, the percentage of your income you spend on housing. If you want to invest and get rich, stay under 25% of your take-home.

62376850
>>62372621
24k X infinite is more than 50k

62376855
>>62376556
Yep, people forget how much it costs to keep a home maintained. On top of taxes, interest and insurance, most houses require 1-2% of their value spent on maintenance every year. No mutual funds ever needed a new AC unit or roof.

62376874
>>62372604
Whether you are paying rent or interest, you are throwing the money away. At least with renting someone else is taking all the capital depreciation and liability risk.

62377090
>>62372604
did a retard write this shit? do you really not know the reason why people rent over buying A FUCKING HOUSE???

62377165
>>62372604
This chart is bogus. I make $80,000 a year and bought a house for $300,000 back in 2024. My monthly take home is no where near $10,000

62377214
>>62377090
Did you read the op…?

62377226
>>62376833
> is not high in most places these days. If you equate that to a house payment that is under $300k which in major metros is ghetto tier housing.
Kek>>62377165
>>62376833
> If you want to invest and get rich, stay under 25% of your take-home.
You’re not rich if you don’t own a house and everything is just tied up the market. lol.
That’s why the home ownership class in good areas are so far ahead.
Wealth gap, once again.

62377272
i own a few duplexes

every year i raise the rent and every year the tenties explain why they cant afford it

then they renew the lease anyway

its honestly kinda inspiring

62377298
Another thread where 80 IQ mongoloids with a 3% mortgage try doing the math that has already been done a million times showing that renting + equities > home ownership from a financial point of view

Btw if you stop paying property taxes the government takes your house

62377350
>>62377298
rent's due on the 1st

increasing $50

thank you for your service

62377435
>>62377350

Oh no, the landlord raised rent for the 6 month lease by 40 minutes of work a month ):

Meanwhile:

62377512
>>62372937
Huh? Who leases for more than a year? My apt has up to 15 months so I do that. But it goes up 4% every time.

I do put about $10k/yr into the market but my rent is like 50 fucking % of my after tax pay. I reconnected with my long lost dad so I have a parent with a house finally, but not sure if I'd move in just to save $25k/yr when I'll be 34 and long past should have started a family by then

62377522
>>62377435
you can show this to the leasing office when you renew

62377531
>>62372604
im sorry but every home is 300k+ and not everyone is making 10k a month.

62377592
>>62377298
invalid comparison

there's no reason you can't own a home and put just as much money into stocks.

rent isn't free. It costs as much or more than a mortgage. That's money you're throwing away

62377725
>>62372604
>mortgage is 14% of my monthly NET income.
Neighborhood is upper middle class white people and Asians.
Feels good

62377937
>>62377725
Imagine crawling into a moist bed every day. Pool rooms put off so much moisture that the humidity would make your sheets sticky every day. Not only that, but God forbid you splash and your bed is now straight up soaked. Oh yeah a and who wants to smell like pool chemicals every day? This is so retarded, but it would be fun for 45 minutes.

62377944
urbanite trash vs rural chads

62378180
>>62377937
I believe that was just a staged photo anon, chill.

62378190
Hmmmm
>rent cheap with enough spare income to invest in the stock market
Or
>pay an expensive mortgage with Insurance just to be house broke and own the property in 30 years

Ownership is good for the sake of owning but it is such a shitty investment vehicle.

62378268
>>62372604
Look man tell me I'm wrong or that I'm coping or that I'm stupid I don't care what you say to me but this shit genuinely sounds like it didn't happen. I don't know why, but whenever you make these threads about you speaking to people or the gym people going home to count their money it just comes off as a made up scenario that only happened inside your head. I don't know what you're trying to do or if you need meds or maybe I need meds but holy shit it just reads like cringe imaginary scenarios. Maybe you're just autistic and need some form of outlet or something...

62378361
>>62372604
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62378368
>>62372604
>Small company = low pay
What?

62378369
>>62378180
IDK, there was a lot of crazy shit in the 70s.

>>62378268
Definitely never happened, can't care what OP says because they deny it every time

62378396
>get mortgage
>miss a payment by a picosecond on your last month
>lose the house and 20 years of your life
Maybe if we lived in an era where you could keep the same job forever, i would not be afraid, but nowadays you are gambling on the grueling torture of the job market after an unavoidable layoff

62378653
>>62372937
LOL delusional. People with mortgages before 2021 are paying less than renters with lower loan amounts and 2% interest rate, a modern aristocracy if you will. Renters live at the mercy of their landlords

item.title: how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE… — 67 replies — 46.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE…

Open thread • Replies: 67 • Updated: 2026-06-17 07:24 UTC

OP

how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEET would they be fine with it.. probably not i think they want you to be grinding your job 24/7 and making like 400k a year

Early replies (first 3)

62365550
dating is outdated chud, find something else to focus on

62365555
>>62365550
but i want a gf to watch mobis with, to eat some delicious food, cook together maybe and stuff.. I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection we could do it together if i had a gf

:(

62365557
>>62365540
a good prostitute in euro cuck land will service you starting from 100$ for 30 mins. Anything else is cope

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366677
>>62365608
all of these women made a different man spend thousands and wait months before fucking really makes you ponder

62366728
>>62366599
well eventually these kinds of women also tend to be single mothers

62367007
>>62365897
Yes paradoxically the girls that are most wife material aren't the ones going around looking to date. I think if you are out of school you're out of luck
>Girlfriend through connections
I know this sounds stupid, but I'd feel like a cuck if I met my girlfriend through a mutual.
Think about it, MY girlfriend would have been interested in talking to someone else FIRST. I wouldn't want to date a girl with guy friends anyways

Impossible propositions are abound

62367017
>>62366635
Do the math.

62367050
>>62367007
Yeah, that’s pretty retarded.
There are plenty of non-sexual reasons why a guy might know some other girl, like a family member, girlfriend/wife’s friend, former co-worker, former school friend.
You could make friends with girls to try to date one of their friends too.
The crux is on your ability to be a normal person to any normal person regardless of gender or age.
That’s how you find girls who aren’t sluts and divorce rapists. Not how you sleep around though.
So you have to figure out if what you really want is someone to have sex with regularly, or someone to start a family with. Because it’s a lot of social effort.

62367055
>>62367007
I just realized, you may have severely low self esteem if you can’t handle the thought of a gf talking to someone else before you.
Low self esteem is girl repellant
Fix that first

62367080
>>62365555
Checked and damn feels bad, I hope you make it.

>>62365540
Former sex haver here, if she loves you not much. Unironically you could go have a picnic with some bullshit like pizza, or go on a road trip. Strategic use of money is ideal. Don't just buy flowers, get them delivered to her work so all her coworkers get pissed and jealous. You want enough money to lock down a nice wedding and kids but thats really it, this was my fatal mistake. I have enough for three weddings now but opportunities are gone for me.

62367870
I get 1k CAD neetbux and do just fine
If not a demo thread, you're overthinking it retard

62367927
>>62365555
unironically, where are the lazy NEET gfs?

62368381
>>62365555
I just want to watch gun boat ball 2 wit my aspie unicorn believing gf turned housewife mommy with fear of scrutiny. I guess i was born too late

62368990
>>62367050
>>62367055
Think about it though. If a girl has tons of guy friends, that's a pretty clear no signal right?
>Low self esteem
true :(

62369133
>>62368990
>>62368990
You can make friends with women too anon. Women that you aren't interested in can have friends that you are interested in.

Also girls can have guy friends that they don't wanna fuck.

Unironically truely befriend a lesbian, this will teach you how to act around women without acting like a retard as you won't try to fuck her.

Also if you're so insecure talk to a therapist/take shrooms and start working out. Its all ego that you have to let go in the end.

Good luck fren!

62369150
All the matches I got on tinder is 30s post wall roast, I can’t believe the 28yi tinder matches something literally call me old hag when I’m just a 35yo bald, obese, needy, short, no STEM degree, and potentially impotent.

62369226
>>62365540
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62369807
>>62365540
Elon is worth $1,000,000,000,000 and still can't find a woman that wants to stay with him

62371591
>>62369133
> take shrooms
Based

>>62368990
You’re letting your insecurities delude you.

62371912
>>62365555
you sound like a retard

62371972
>>62369133
>Also girls can have guy friends that they don't wanna fuck.
even if this is the case the guy most likely wants to fuck them you retard.

part of being in a relationship is having a basic level of respect for your partner. that means dropping all single behaviour, so no hanging out 1 on 1 with the opposite sex, no texting other guys, and no getting drunk without you in bars/clubs. its not insecurity to expect a the most basic of relationship boundaries.

>just take drugs bro!
>go pay money to a millenial woman
holy bluepilled retard

62373795
>>62369807
tbf net worth is not how much money you have

62374837
>>62371972
You're correct that having boundaries isn't insecurity, but not trying to ask your friends if they know a single girl because you believe she talked to your friend is deeply insecure. No one here was talking about behavior after meeting, this dude won't even want to speak to a girl that would've known a male friend
NGMI behavior

62378030
>>62365555
What is up with normies and "cooking"??? I like preparing my own fucking meals and I don't want to cook with you nor eat your food nor make some big show about THE DINNER TABLE NARF NARF NARF like food should be strictly for utilitarian purposes only. Also women have a sinful relationship with food. You would think it was porn to them. Foodies and fat people gross me out. Humans have to ruin so many things. Don't even get me started on BLACK PEOPLE

62378038
>>62365608
Mainly non brown chicks right?

62378415
>>62365540
You have been priced out of prime young teen. Start dating older woman which is closer to the post wall in youth.

62378662
>>62365555
>got a blu ray player
Why not just get on PTP instead of wasting your money?
>>62365595
How old were you?
>>62365989
Holy fuck. I will remain khhv forever
>>62369226
Depends on age and many other factors
>>62369807
He had a threesome with Cara Delivigne and Amber heard, got prime Amber to do a high quality cosplay and roles of his waifu (mercy) for him, and made prime alt princess grimes completely obsessed with him. He won multiple times over when it comes to women, especially compared to other billionaires.

62378677
>>62378662
>How old were you?
32

62378686
>>62378677
>32
So i still have time, like 2 years away. $800k net. I'm pretty sure I'll hit 1m by then but not so sure about the gf.

62378720
>>62378686
you just launched a whole interdimensional TED Talk powered by three screenshots, two podcasts, and a gas-station energy drink.
You're standing on a folding chair yelling, "EVERY SINGLE WOMAN CAN JUST BECOME RICH, DATE A CELEBRITY, FIND A SUGAR DADDY, OR MARRY SOME DEVOTED GUY," like life is a character-select screen in a video game where everybody spawns with max charisma and infinite social options.
My brother in chaos, that's not how reality works.
You took a handful of visible examples, put them in a blender, added internet rage, and came out with a theory that somehow explains half the human population. That's clown astronomy. You're looking at three bright stars and declaring you've mapped the entire galaxy.
And then when someone tells a story about a rude interaction on a dating app, your brain teleports straight back to the same speech. Like the conversation took a bus stop and you arrived riding a shopping cart with no wheels.
The wild part is that your argument assumes every person has equal opportunities, equal looks, equal luck, equal social skills, equal location, equal connections, and equal willingness to do the things you're listing. That's a level of simplification so aggressive it could flatten a mountain into a parking lot.
Reality is messy. Some people struggle. Some people succeed. Some get lucky. Some don't. Some are attractive and still miserable. Some are average and find great relationships. Human lives aren't assembled from four preset buttons.
So when you scream "EVERY SINGLE ONE," that's the clown horn giving itself CPR.
The issue isn't that you're making a point. The issue is that you're treating a giant, complicated reality like a meme template and acting surprised when people look confused.
You're not describing the world.
You're describing a cartoon version of the world that lives rent-free inside your own echo chamber.

62378730
>>62378720
Ok chatgpt very cool

62378739
>>62366590
Those families are pre 2025+ hypergamy

62378802
>>62366052
>he thinks the average foid has less rates of herpes
lol
lmao

At least high class escorts routinely get checked. You think the average woman's ego would allow her to get regular checks? We're literally at the stage where high class, well-regulated services are safer than your typical bar hookup.

item.title: Law of the jungle — 190 replies — 26.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Law of the jungle

Open thread • Replies: 190 • Updated: 2026-06-17 01:40 UTC

OP

>I am a million billion trillionair-
>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387
>nigger tier envy thread
>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62373692
>>62365676
>lectures about being a sociopath for buying and selling stuff
>unironically aspires to murder strangers in cold blood out of envy
your brain on communism

62373696
>>62373692
welcome to the real world, pussy
Those "strangers" are vampires drunk on my blood and the blood of my brothers and my ancestors

62373718
>>62373696
Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath. It also doesn't make you tough. Just retarded.

62373727
>>62373718
I hope you know what happens to class traitors :)

62373746
>>62373727
>whining on 4chan since 2007
>but now his depressed drunken tough talk is totez 4 realz
you won't do shit

62373751
>>62373746
and you're too pussy to even talk shit about your masters

62373760
i suddenly feel very horny

62373773
>>62373751
>toothless impotent rage makes me a badass!
kek

62374025
>>62373773
>being le stoic cuck makes me better

62374136
>>62359336
what are you saying? That the entire 2 trillion value of SpaceX is based on one man who is vulnerable to any number of Luigis and it would be pretty foolish to invest with that level of risk?

62374949
>>62370324
>revolutionary
I see you still haven't responded to >>62368447
NYPA, nigger.

62374958
>>62371364
he's only here to sow dissent. is either
a) paid shill
b) tranny
c) on antidepressants
d) vaxxed
or some combination.
>>62371449
take your meds.

62374966
>>62373377
>>62373388
>>62373610
this board is dead you idiot.
go jump off a bridge so we can use that as the signal for le ebin revolution.

62374996
>>62373718
>Nothing "real world" about uttering two antithetical ideas in the same breath.
the real world is rife with contradiction and inconsistency. just look at this thread. you have poor retard manual laborers swearing allegiance to a system that is strangling what's left of the middle class to death.

62375795
>>62374996
What i meant is that the simultaneously held antitheses are not and cannot be accurately reflective of any real world property or state. I didn't mean to imply that people or societies are consistent. Communist retards have been the ultimate exemplars refuting that assertion for a hundred years.

62375879
>>62359400
>half a dozen fags with glocks
Bodyguard this

62375918
>>62359479
>rothschild way more sympathic

62375922
>>62359403
Yes. In the forest the strong dominates.

62376058
>>62374949
I have nothing to say to you, it's known where you stand

62376070
>>62374966
Capital must be delighted so many dumb brainwashed fucks like you roam the earth
You're not upper class, faggot, you're a worthless slave like I am

62376327
>>62376070
>>62376058
>nooo you have to be a rebel!
lmao

62376332
>>62376070
>you're not upper class
where did I say I was?
Unlike you, I am not compelled to "have it all" by propaganda

62376571
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AFzu_w7d9W0
Bothered to make a singable english version of one of my fav communist songs
Be thankful maggots

Anyway:

Brothers, we reach for the rifles
Into the decisive fight
Why should the workers still trifle?
Why fear the specter of might?
Why should the workers still trifle?
Why fear the specter of might?
Break these old frozen cold slave chains!
World set ablaze in red flames
To Break all chains that is our true plight
Brothers are lost, without light
We free ourselves from this slavery
Clench our armed fists for the strike
So that it may on our slavers
Strike as a thunderstorm might
To them we are docile, just cattle
To us that appeared to be fate
We reject fate through the final battle
Drones, rifles, bombs, all our hate
Rise to bring down all the tyrants
Fight to the death, our new fate!
Conquer the world for our children
Build a free socialist state!

62376741
"Whatever it takes to switch places with the busters on top
I'm bustin' shots, make the world stop"
-2pac

Fuck all you'll cowards, I saw some pathetic fuck hating on communism in a now deleted thread just earlier because he worked oh so hard for... 70k!!!! LOL!!!! you're nothing pal, a slave, trash, garbage, I wipe my ass with your net worth. Faggot
I want the fucking casino, the consolation prize isn't enough

62377076
>>62376332
I really do wonder what the fuck is going on with these obnoxious raids the last few years.
Congratulations: you came in to a dead community and shit it up even harder by spewing provably retarded nonsense
WEEEEEEEEEEE INNANETS (that wouldn't exist at all under forced collectivism)

These are also curiously the only threads that don't get pruned despite being WILDLY off topic

62377094
>>62376332
I'm not compelled by propaganda, but by own disposition. The same mentality that got the ruling class to acquire their position in the first place.

62377115
And then you eat him?

62377690
>>62377094
nigger you literally said you wanted to kill someone's family, implying because they wouldn't start a revolution.
FUCK OFF.
>>62377076
trannies / glowniggers / jewish raiders.. combination thereof... the lack of pruning is especially obnoxious. (((federal assets))) have been trying to poke and prod for class war for some time now and are profoundly defeated by "lol I'm just going to do nothing" attitude of modern men.
>>62376741
for someone who hates capitalism, you sure do talk a lot about money.

62377916
>>62376741
ma nigga

pac the GOAT no doubt

62378174
>>62377690
Fuck you and gimme that loot you mark ass bitch

62372289

item.title: > Our system is designed to concentrate wealth and keep the majority of workers on the brink of bankruptcy. — 64 replies — 11.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
> Our system is designed to concentrate wealth and keep the majority of workers on the brink of bankruptcy.

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-06-17 03:11 UTC

OP

> Our system is designed to concentrate wealth and keep the majority of workers on the brink of bankruptcy.

I hate poor people so much.
Here is reply there:
> If I had no income for eight weeks, l'd end up homeless. There's no recovery from that for me.

People like THAT are people that seethe at the rich.
People with low income and IQ and 0 savings.
The underclass.

Early replies (first 3)

62376589
Hello OPCD
Ready for powerposting again?

62376633
>>62376579
Are redditors that ignorant?

62376657
>>62376579
he's right and you're delusional and kind of a freak tbqh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62377385
>>62377379
I did that too, but I work a comfy white collar job WFH.

62377386
>>62377348
>he thinks net worth is like World of Warcraft experience points

62377387
>>62377379
you are literally a dalit. no pussy, no respect, own nothing, working for the man. but hey you have you magical jew number at the jew amusement park. you are actually worse off than a slave.

62377390
>>62377383
how many, though? are you a virgin at 30? you are, aren't you. do you have ed already?

62377392
>>62377387
What is your nw? Or income?

62377395
>>62377392
what's nw? i just neetbux. also i have 7 kids currently and shagging a mentally ill cunt.

62377396
>>62376579
if you literally just have a job in america, any job, and aren't paying for multiple kids you are not struggling financially
most poor people are chronically poor

62377405
>>62377392
yep, you networth and income matter

62377413
>>62377396
money doesn't even get you pussy. when you faggots get your chnkoid mail order bride from some shithole, she'll just divorce you and take half your shit.

so, you are a dalit in
>any job
if the job doesn't get you fullfilment of a basic human need such as pussy or a house, you are getting fucked in the ass worse than a serf. a medieval serf had a wife and owned a house. you guys are literally dalits and you are coping via jew assigned numbers.

62377416
>>62377395
Okay. So you’re underclass and unwanted bacteria.
I could tell. People with no value, no income or net worth love to mention “muh wife” on 4chan lol.

62377419
>>62377396
Doesn't that depend on where you live? i doubt a wendy's job is gonna support someone in SF.

62377423
>>62377416
>unwanted
you are a virgin, though. literally no one wants you. keep coping, you'll die with big jew number and the jews will take your number(since you have no one to pass it on to) and they'll say "what a good goy that have been, and he made me a lot of money too"

62377425
>>62376579
It is. The housing market is fucked, but the system is importing infinity migrants and producing propaganda that tries to convince young men with no money to leave their parents home and become rent or debt slaves for most of their lives.

62377427
>>62377129
He didn’t do that in his post, though.

62377436
>>62377387
you sound pretty upset

62377441
>>62377436
i dunno bro, you are clearly clinically depressed >>62377161 and would probably kys at this point if you had no fear of death. so, sounds like a projection.

62377443
>>62377441
everyone would kill themselves if they didnt have a fear of death

62377446
>>62377443
i wouldn't. kyssing is for cuckolds who can't make decisions for themselves. and it kinda goes to show how right i am on the dalit point, considering your position is held by the majority of anons. i pity you guys.

62377520
>>62377053
>They will actually fight to protect the system if you try to dismantle it
Every time I post that we need to deflate the currency slowly to help the poor, some retard responds that inflation is good for the economy.
So you are correct.

62377588
>>62376792
Maybe convince them with some words then, shouldn't be hard.

62377626
>>62377520
Deflation isn't an option except with a huge economic downturn as a driver and from a macro perspective the USD is too strong for onshoring as is. Embrace inflation and use it to make more domestics jobs in manufacturing. End America being predominantly a center for financial investment in the form of equities and bonds, have the money instead flow into factories and wages. Devalue the debt but use the inflation for something good rather than kicking the can further with near ruined nation. We've reached the limit as far as being an issuer of reserve currency is concerned, it ends the same way as any other time. Also, slowing useless spending, Military & Social security, that would even get us to a less unbalanced budget much less deflation is not politically viable. DOGE would have been successful if it was. No one willingly takes cuts to entitlements or government employees so you can either effect it via crisis, it becomes inevitable, or via inflation so you maintain balances and payments in nominal terms to avoid the headlines associated with cutting. Even this is hard to manage but mathematically there are not many other options available.

62377796
>>62376579
Who cares?

62377811
>>62376579
Gotta keep the epstein class fat and happy

62377901
>>62377588
>"convince" cultists of anything outside of their beliefs
>worse, try using logic or common sense
good luck anon

62377989
>>62377396
Imagine believing this.

62377996
>>62376579
Gold is wealth

62378111
>>62377208
>12 posts from a seething shitskin who lives in the slums
You're not fooling anyone, Sukhdeep.

62378133
>>62376579
Having two months of savings is not impossible. You should have three minimum. Just budget, cut expenses and make more money however you can. You should get to the point where you can save 10% of your monthly income.

62378314
yet another nepo schizo thread

62378381
>>62376579
